title: hydrocotyle geraniifolia
intro: Hydrocotyle geraniifolia, also known as the pennywort plant, is a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic herb native to Australia and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, round leaves resembling coins. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle geraniifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting eye health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine and Ayurvedic practices.
